title: Documentation, APIs, Licenses, and Generated-Artifact Gates · Spiral Review
summary: Keep human and machine contracts synchronized with implementation. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a documentation and contract drift suite after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test README setup and core commands from a clean environment.
Validate API schemas, generated clients, migrations, and compatibility changes.
Test documentation links and executable examples where practical.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle
steps.instruction: Order the Readme Setup evidence cycle before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Readme Setup assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Test README setup and core commands from a clean environment. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: gates docs contracts. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Readme Setup, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a documentation and contract drift suite.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Documentation is correct if it looks complete. This fails the Readme Setup contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.value: GitHub Actions and Status Checks Documentation (Current 2026-07-13) — Controls workflow events, jobs, matrices, artifacts, security, and required check integration.

content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test README setup and core commands from a clean environment.

Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

stimulus.title: Generated Drift case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: gates docs contracts. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Regenerate schemas, clients, docs, and fixtures and fail on unexplained diffs. Artifact under review: a documentation and contract drift suite.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Generated Drift, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Generated Drift applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Regenerate schemas, clients, docs, and fixtures and fail on unexplained diffs.
